creator: glebius@glebius.int.ru
text:
--DocE+STaALJfprDB
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=koi8-r
 Content-Disposition: inline
 
  The patch in submission was reverse. Here is correct one.
 
 -- 
 Totus tuus, Glebius.
 
 --DocE+STaALJfprDB
 Content-Type: text/x-diff; charset=koi8-r
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="openssh-portable.diff"
 
 diff -Nur openssh-portable/Makefile /usr/ports/security/openssh-portable/Makefile
 --- openssh-portable/Makefile	2011-12-23 16:52:28.000000000 +0400
 +++ /usr/ports/security/openssh-portable/Makefile	2012-03-26 16:42:28.000000000 +0400
 @@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
  
  PORTNAME=	openssh
  DISTVERSION=	5.8p2
 -PORTREVISION=	1
 +PORTREVISION=	2
  PORTEPOCH=	1
  CATEGORIES=	security ipv6
  MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_OPENBSD}
 @@ -26,7 +26,6 @@
  
  CONFLICTS?=		openssh-3.* ssh-1.* ssh2-3.*
  
 -USE_PERL5=		yes
  USE_PERL5_BUILD=	yes
  USE_OPENSSL=		yes
  GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
 
 --DocE+STaALJfprDB--
